alwaysVisible.description: Render the suggestions even when the thread already contains messages. By default SuggestionsRoot hides itself once a message exists, since the empty state is its primary use case. Set this to true to use it inline after an assistant reply (e.g. for follow-up prompts).

autoSubmit.description: Whether to auto-submit when a suggestion is clicked.

suggestions.description: Suggestion items. Strings are normalized to { value, label }. Ignored when children are provided.

root.description: Styles applied to the root element.
